title: Thol Heat Wave
lead: Thol is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.46. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Thol has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 21.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 25%, which can exacerbate the perceived heat. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 7.3 km/h, which can trap heat and worsen the situation.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
